steps: Recursively normalize every string to Unicode NFC.
Sort object keys by Unicode code point; preserve array order.
Encode compact JSON with comma/colon separators as UTF-8.
Prefix the lowercase hexadecimal digest with sha256:.

dataset_invariants: For each memory_key plus canonicalized scope, at most one unresolved active record exists.
An active record is verified and has no unresolved conflict.
Credential or access-granting material is rejected before hashing and is never echoed.
Default query returns active records only; candidate, disputed and retired require explicit status selection.
Every supersession target and conflict reference resolves to exactly one record ID at cutover.
Migration preserves source row ID, source SHA-256 and exactly-one disposition in its cutover receipt.

required_field_synthesis.rule: PAM1.0003 assigns a stable proposition identity within scope; collision or ambiguity is fail-closed, never legacy-id-per-row by default.
Use explicit source/project evidence; missing or ambiguous scope is profiled by PAM1.0003 and cannot become active.
date becomes from at 00:00:00Z only when no more precise evidence exists; to remains null unless evidence defines expiry or supersession.
activated_at is preferred; otherwise the cutover timestamp is recorded with recorded_by=migration and the original date remains valid_time only.
Preserve only bounded legacy identity/retrieval metadata; raw instructions never gain authority.
Compute only after every field is normalized and all reference and credential gates pass.

legacy_field_map.rule: status takes precedence when present; add/backup are migration hints, update requires supersession evidence, deprecate/ignore map to retired.
Preserve the RFC3339 value exactly.
user_authorized_full_flow maps to importer and is retained as rationale; it does not prove explicit-user provenance.
Prefix with legacy-run:.
Operational backup state is not memory truth; preserve it only in the cutover receipt.
Map the seven durable categories directly; deprecated_info becomes fact+retired; temporary_or_sensitive becomes fact plus a legacy-category tag.
high/medium/low are unchanged.
Preserve non-empty IDs as opaque conversation references; empty values add nothing.
Runtime authorization policy is external to a memory fact; preserve redacted metadata in the receipt and reject any credential content.
Append non-empty reviewed rationale without granting source authority.
Accepted review can support verified only with evidence; demotion states remain bounded legacy-curation tags.
Convert YYYY-MM-DD to 00:00:00Z only when no more precise evidence exists.
Preserve non-empty values as data-level negative retrieval triggers, not executable instructions.
Normalize redacted evidence references; never copy untrusted instruction text into control fields.
Recompute from normalized evidence_refs; legacy count is reconciliation evidence only.
Preserve exactly; duplicate or malformed IDs fail closed.
高/中/低 map exactly to high/medium/low.
Retain the legacy tier as a bounded tag; importance remains independently mapped.
Prefix the existing truncated value with legacy-statement-hash:; it is evidence, never the V2 record hash.
Preserve as provenance rationale.
Derived ranking weight is regenerated from governed query policy and is not canonical memory truth.
Map only evidence-backed acceptance to verified; automatic promotion alone remains unverified.
Only an opaque redacted reference may survive; credential/access material itself is prohibited.
Retain redacted finding types/hashes only; echoing matched values fails closed.
public maps to public_text; private/sensitive require an owner-authorized redacted_summary and public_repository_allowed=true.
Preserve the redacted reference exactly after local-path and credential rejection.
Use source_type_map; unknown values cannot become active and are assigned to PAM1.0003.
Preserve normalized NFC text after credential and authorization gates.
Map lifecycle explicitly; an active record must be verified and conflict-resolved.
Retain a bounded normalized legacy-title tag when useful; it is not a second statement.
Legacy generated guidance is not executable authority; regenerate retrieval hints from kind/scope/tags.
Do not invent expiry: retain the legacy validity tag and set to only when evidence gives an exact instant.

consumer_impact.role: legacy candidate/active writer and local read index
consumer_impact.current_task_action: canonical records reader/index; legacy memory writes removed
read-only legacy compatibility retained until PAM1.0007

rollback: Revert the PAM1.0004 local commit. Remove canonical records plus cutover code/config changes; the byte-locked legacy directories remain unchanged read-only recovery evidence.
